authority.department: Labour Welfare and Skill Development Department, Government of Tamil Nadu

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Tamil Nadu.

rules.title: Review Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Act is applicable.

citations.reference: Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Act, 1947

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records, attendance registers, wage registers and notices prescribed under Tamil Nadu labour legislation.

citations.reference: Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Rules

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices, abstracts and employee information required under Tamil Nadu labour laws.

citations.reference: Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Tamil Nadu provisions governing working hours, spread-over, overtime, leave, holidays and weekly offs.

citations.reference: Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Act

rules.title: Review Tamil Nadu Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the Tamil Nadu Labour Welfare Fund including periodic employer and employee contributions.

citations.reference: Tamil Nadu Labour Welfare Fund Act

rules.title: Review Professional Tax Compliance
rules.description: Determine applicability of Professional Tax levied by local bodies such as Municipal Corporations, Municipalities and Town Panchayats, and ensure registration, deduction and payment wherever applicable.

citations.reference: Tamil Nadu Municipal Laws relating to Professional Tax

rules.title: Review Tamil Nadu Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest Tamil Nadu minimum wage notifications applicable to the scheduled employment.

citations.reference: Government of Tamil Nadu Minimum Wage Notifications

rules.title: Monitor Tamil Nadu Labour Notifications
rules.description: Review labour department notifications, amendments, exemptions and compliance circulars issued by the Government of Tamil Nadu.

citations.reference: Government of Tamil Nadu Labour Notifications

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering labour registrations, Labour Welfare Fund, Professional Tax, statutory records and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for Professional Tax due dates, Labour Welfare Fund contributions, statutory filings, inspections and licence renewals.
